commands.summary: OperationKey identity tests passed for session, graph, attachment instance, attachment kind, operation id, and operation kind.

tests_covered: OperationKey includes session id, graph id, attachment instance id, attachment kind, operation id, and operation kind
Same operation id from an old session does not match a new session
An operation key cannot be reused while a tombstone is retained
allowed_operations_checked: Added operation identity value types under attachment runtime family
forbidden_operations_checked: Operation id is not unique only within process
Old OperationKey cannot be reused while tombstone is retained
